prompt_used: Dark cinematic underscore in D minor, recognizable instruments: cello sustained drone, viola tremolo with quiet menace, spectral violin harmonics high in distance, sparse glockenspiel notes, deep double bass sub-bass impact on accents. Dark mystery atmosphere pulling the listener in. Designed for seamless background looping under documentary narration. 70 BPM, brooding and weighted, consistent dark intensity throughout. STRICTLY AVOID: vocals, lyrics, singing, choir, spoken word, drums, percussion, drum beat, rhythm patterns, kick drum, snare, hi-hat, melody hooks, memorable melodies, vocal-like leads, pop structure, EDM, synthwave, dubstep, trap, verse chorus structure, electric guitar, distortion, harsh synths, intro fade-in, outro fade-out, abrupt ending, sudden silence, build-up drops, upbeat, happy, energetic dance, playful.

elevenlabs_metadata.title: Dark Mystery Underscore
elevenlabs_metadata.description: A dark cinematic underscore in D minor at 70 BPM. Features a brooding and weighted atmosphere with a cello sustained drone, menacing viola tremolo, distant spectral violin harmonics, sparse glockenspiel notes, and deep double bass impacts. Designed for seamless looping under documentary narration, maintaining a consistent dark intensity throughout.

positive_local_styles: spectral violin harmonics high in distance
deep double bass sub-bass impact on accents
